scripts.dev: tsc && concurrently -k -n API,WEB,ELECTRON "cross-env PORT=8080 pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run dev" "cross-env PORT=8081 BASE_PATH=/ pnpm --filter @workspace/frontend run dev" "wait-on http://localhost:8081 && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron ."
scripts.dev:web: cross-env PORT=8081 BASE_PATH=/ pnpm --filter @workspace/frontend run dev
scripts.build:frontend: cross-env PORT=8081 BASE_PATH=/ pnpm --filter @workspace/frontend run build
scripts.build: pnpm run build:api && pnpm run build:frontend && pnpm run build:main && electron-builder
scripts.pack: pnpm run build:api && pnpm run build:frontend && pnpm run build:main && electron-builder --dir
